_doc: Single source of truth for canonicalâ†’installed surface mapping. Consumed by runtime-sync.py AND posttool-sync-weigh.sh. Edit HERE, not in consumers.
_tracked_external_scripts_doc: Runtime-invokable scripts that live OUTSIDE cgg-runtime/ by intentional placement (e.g., path-locked to a data location). Not subject to ~/.claude install/sync, but registered here so runtime-sync awareness includes them. Declares ownership without forcing relocation. See CogPR for Runtime-Invokable Scripts Must Register in Sync Manifest.

tracked_external_scripts.install_reason: project-local; uses Path(__file__).parent to resolve queue.jsonl as sibling â€” relocation breaks path lock
tracked_external_scripts.schema_coverage_limit: TERMINAL_STATUSES is narrower than federation terminal set; widening is a doctrine question (CogPR-159), not silent expansion
